items.name: "openai-docs"
items.description: "Use when the user asks how to build with OpenAI products or APIs and needs up-to-date official documentation with citations, help choosing the latest model for a use case, or model upgrade and prompt-upgrade guidance; prioritize OpenAI docs MCP tools, use bundled references only as helper context, and restrict any fallback browsing to official OpenAI domains."

items.name: ai-org-analysis-add
items.description: Use when working in the AI Org research project and an existing company report needs new essence or source-note evidence added without rebuilding the report.

items.name: ai-org-analysis
items.description: Use when working in the AI Org research project and turning company essence files into detailed analysis markdown, fact packs, complex reports, one-page reports, or organization/investment analysis.

items.name: ai-org-collect
items.description: Use when working in the AI Org research project and starting or repairing company data collection, especially podcasts, financials, Substack, YouTube, transcripts, or vault sync.

items.name: ai-org-essence
items.description: Use when working in the AI Org research project and converting transcripts, podcast notes, YouTube transcripts, Substack articles, or reports into source-level essence files.

items.name: ai-org-financial-modeling
items.description: Launcher for the AI Org public-company financial modeling workflow. Use for DCF/comps workbook generation from collected statements, market data, valuation, peers, and capital signals.

items.name: ai-org-public-company-collect
items.description: Launcher for the AI Org public-company collection workflow. Use for listed-company filings, earnings calls, market data, books, investor views, and semi-public research folders.

items.name: xlsx
items.description: Use when working with Excel-compatible spreadsheet files, including .xlsx, .xls, .csv, and .tsv files; creating, editing, analyzing, formatting, charting, validating formulas, or exporting workbooks.

items.name: analysis-add
items.description: Use when working in the AI Org research project and an existing company report must absorb new source-note evidence without rebuilding the report or changing its established framework.

items.name: analysis
items.description: Use when turning company essence files into detailed analysis markdown under companies/{slug}/analysis, especially long complex reports, fact packs, evidence maps, and organization/investment analysis.

items.name: collect
items.description: Use when starting or repairing a company research collection pipeline for AI org / investment work, especially when the task needs podcasts, financials, Substack, YouTube, transcripts, or vault sync.

items.name: essence
items.description: Use when converting company transcripts, podcast notes, YouTube transcripts, Substack articles, reports, jobs pages, or other source material into source-level notes for AI org or investment research.

items.name: financial-modeling
items.description: Build a source-mapped public-company DCF and comps workbook from collected statements, market data, valuation, peers, and capital signals.

items.name: public-company-collect
items.description: Collect public-company filings, statements, market data, capital-market signals, earnings calls, books, and semi-public research scaffolding for A-share, US, and Hong Kong listed companies.
